name: TestIso11783IL_OPSelectInput
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSelectInput
tables: long TestIso11783IL_OPSelectInput( dbNode node, dword objectID, dword select );

The function selects an input object. A Select Input command is sent to the Virtual Terminal. Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

Note Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous. Further information on site MultiBus Environment.
node Simulation node to apply the function.
objectID object ID of an input object
select 0: no input object shall be selected (i.e. focus is removed) 1: select input object 2: open input object for user input (only version >= 3)
0: function has been executed successfully <0: an error has occurred, see error codes
